nasb.text: And the Avvim, who lived in villages as far as Gaza, the Caphtorim who came from Caphtor, destroyed them and lived in their place.)

esv.text: As for the Avvim, who lived in villages as far as Gaza, the Caphtorim, who came from Caphtor, destroyed them and settled in their place.)

ccb.text: 同样，来自克里特的迦斐托人消灭了迦萨附近的亚卫人，住在那里。
